sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Portnoy Law Firm Announces Class Action on Behalf of uniQure N.V. Investors
feed.summary: The Portnoy Law Firm has announced a class action lawsuit on behalf of investors in uniQure N.V. (NASDAQ: QURE) who purchased securities between September 24, 2025, and October 31, 2025. This action follows a significant drop in uniQure's stock price after the company disclosed that the FDA no longer agreed that data from its Phase I/II studies for AMT-130 would be sufficient for a Biologics License Application submission. Investors have until April 13, 2026, to file a lead plaintiff motion.

feed.title: SP Funds S&P Global Technology ETF (SPTE) Stock Price, News, Quote & History
feed.summary: This Yahoo Finance page provides detailed information on the SP Funds S&P Global Technology ETF (SPTE), including its current stock price, trading history, and performance. The ETF focuses on global large-cap information technology equities adhering to Shariah investment guidelines. It also lists key financial metrics, sector weightings, and related technology and Shariah-compliant ETFs.

feed.title: Compass Diversified (NYSE:CODI) Given New $10.50 Price Target at B. Riley Financial
feed.summary: B. Riley Financial has raised its price target for Compass Diversified (NYSE:CODI) to $10.50 from $8.00, maintaining a "neutral" rating, which implies a potential 7.8% upside. This adjustment comes after the company reported a significant earnings miss in its last quarter, with shares currently trading near $9.74. Despite the mixed analyst ratings, which average out to a "Hold" with a target price of $12.75, insider Stephen Keller recently purchased 30,000 shares, and institutional ownership stands at approximately 72.7%.

feed.title: Did you buy this toothpaste? You may qualify for a cash payout.
feed.summary: Consumers who purchased Tom's of Maine toothpaste products between November 21, 2020, and March 6, 2026, may be eligible for a cash payout from a class-action settlement. The lawsuit accused the company of deceptive practices, which Tom's of Maine denies. Claims must be filed by July 6, and a final approval hearing for the settlement is scheduled for September 10.

feed.title: From Olay to Tampax, P&G brings more of its brands to the WNBA
feed.summary: Procter & Gamble (P&G) has announced a multi-year, multi-brand partnership with the Women’s National Basketball Association (WNBA), expanding its presence in women's sports. Building on Mielle’s existing partnership, brands like Secret, Olay, and Tampax will now engage with the league, leveraging its growing fanbase and cultural influence through various activations. The collaboration aims to celebrate WNBA athletes, amplify their stories, and drive retail growth for P&G brands.

feed.title: Millions of PG&E customers get automatic April bill credits
feed.summary: PG&E will automatically apply the Spring California Climate Credit to customers' April bills. Residential natural gas households will receive a $46.26 credit, while eligible small business customers will receive an electric credit of $36.18. This initiative is part of the state's Cap-and-Invest Program, which has cumulatively delivered nearly $1,200 to PG&E households since 2014, and aims to provide bill relief and promote cleaner energy solutions.

feed.title: BlackRock (NYSE: HPQ) holds 99.5M shares, 10.9% stake reported
feed.summary: BlackRock, Inc. has filed an amended Schedule 13G/A, disclosing beneficial ownership of 99,527,329 shares of HP Inc (NYSE: HPQ) common stock, representing a 10.9% stake as of March 31, 2026. This filing, signed on April 7, 2026, indicates BlackRock has 92,816,267 shares with sole voting power and full dispositive power over all reported shares. The disclosure clarifies institutional ownership without signaling activist intent or immediate changes in voting or disposition plans.

feed.title: Bank of America Corp stock: Analyst buys signal strength amid steady growth outlook
feed.summary: Analysts are issuing "Buy" ratings for Bank of America Corp (BAC) stock, driven by its robust net interest income growth, strategic expansions, and resilience in a higher-rate environment. The bank's diversified business model and strong financial performance, including significant revenue and profit, position it as a compelling investment despite existing risks. Global investors can find value in BAC's scale, consistent dividends, and potential for earnings growth, making it a strong candidate for diversified portfolios.

feed.title: UP Fiber snaps up AT&T's wireline assets across Michigan’s Upper Peninsula and Mackinaw City
feed.summary: UP Fiber has acquired AT&T's wireline assets across Michigan’s Upper Peninsula and Mackinaw City, including over 9,000 miles of network infrastructure and 40 central offices. The financial terms of the deal were not disclosed. UP Fiber plans to invest significant capital to modernize and expand its network, partnering with Michigan Broadband to enhance communication services for over 200,000 locations.

feed.title: Coca‑Cola Marks America’s 250th Anniversary With Nationwide Celebration and Community Initiatives
feed.summary: Coca-Cola is marking America's 250th Anniversary with a nationwide celebration and community initiatives. Key programs include "America's Block Party," aiming to be the largest synchronized Fourth of July celebration in U.S. history, and "America Gives," which encourages volunteer service. The initiatives are part of a broader effort by America250 to unite the nation and celebrate significant moments between July 1 and July 5, 2026.

feed.title: Veteran Loan Fund launches Accelerator to boost Veteran and Military Spouse businesses
feed.summary: The Veteran Loan Fund (VLF), supported by Truist Foundation, has launched the Veteran and Military Spouse Business Accelerator to enhance economic opportunities for military-connected entrepreneurs. This initiative aims to provide capital, training, and business support, including deploying $15 million in loans and up to $1.5 million in grants over the next year. The 8-week program offers comprehensive business education, coaching, and access to funding for successful participants.

feed.title: MSCI Inc. Acquires PM Insights
feed.summary: MSCI Inc. (NYSE: MSCI) has acquired PM Insights, a specialist private markets data and analytics firm. This acquisition is set to enhance MSCI’s capabilities in private asset investing by providing institutional-grade data, pricing transparency, and analytics. PM Insights offers daily secondary market reference data, including pricing, valuation, transaction, and liquidity information for private company securities.

feed.title: A Dividend King on Sale: Is Abbott Labs a Healthcare Bargain?
feed.summary: Abbott Laboratories (ABT) recently hit its 52-week low, prompting questions about its value as a healthcare bargain. While the Nutrition segment faces temporary headwinds, the Medical Devices division demonstrates strong, accelerating growth with market-leading innovations. Analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating, suggesting the stock is undervalued and offers a compelling opportunity for long-term investors due to its reliable dividend and strategic acquisitions.

feed.title: New veteran startup program targets $15M in loans and 1,500 jobs
feed.summary: The Veteran Loan Fund (VLF) has launched a new Accelerator program aiming to deploy $15 million in loans and up to $1.5 million in grants to 300 Veteran and Military Spouse entrepreneurs within 12 months, supporting 1,500 jobs. This initiative is backed by a Truist Foundation grant to PeopleFund and builds on VLF's prior success of having raised $30 million and facilitating over $110 million in business loans to 1,500 entrepreneurs since 2021. The program includes an 8-week instruction period, business coaching, financial training, and ongoing technical assistance for graduates.

feed.title: Rockwell Automation advances New Berlin mega-plant development
feed.summary: Rockwell Automation is moving forward with its mega-plant development in New Berlin, which will incorporate advanced automation, robotics, and digital technologies. This move is intended to demonstrate Rockwell's leadership in modern industrial operations. The project highlights the company's commitment to cutting-edge manufacturing practices.

feed.title: BlackRock (BLK) discloses 10.7% holding in iShares S&P 500 BuyWrite ETF (CUSIP 46438G711)
feed.summary: BlackRock, Inc. has filed a Schedule 13G disclosing a 10.7% beneficial ownership stake in the iShares S&P 500 BuyWrite ETF, amounting to 601,530 shares. The filing indicates that BlackRock's reporting business units hold sole voting and dispositive power over these shares. It also notes that the iShares S&P 500 Premium Income ETF holds an interest exceeding 5% in the same common stock.

feed.title: BlackRock (KREF) holds 5.03M shares, 7.8% reported (Schedule 13G/A)
feed.summary: BlackRock, Inc. has filed a Schedule 13G/A, reporting beneficial ownership of 5,026,321 shares of KKR Real Estate Finance Trust Inc. common stock, which represents 7.8% of the class. The filing indicates BlackRock holds sole voting power over 4,928,841 shares and sole dispositive power over all 5,026,321 shares. This amendment to a passive investment disclosure was signed on April 7, 2026.

feed.title: BlackRock (BLK) discloses 11.5% ownership of iShares MSCI India ETF
feed.summary: BlackRock, Inc. (BLK) has filed a Schedule 13G/A disclosing an 11.5% beneficial ownership stake in the iShares MSCI India ETF, totaling 16,855,457 shares. The filing indicates BlackRock holds sole voting power over 16,341,829 shares and sole dispositive power over all 16,855,457 shares. The report also notes that the MSCI Emerging Markets ex China IMI Index Fund holds more than 5% of the ETF's common stock.

feed.title: BlackRock (NYSE: BLK) discloses 21.96M shares (10.1%) of T. Rowe Price (TROW)
feed.summary: BlackRock, Inc. has disclosed a 10.1% beneficial ownership stake in T. Rowe Price Group, Inc. (TROW), comprising 21,957,917 shares as of March 31, 2026. This Schedule 13G filing indicates a passive investment rather than an attempt to influence control of the company, with BlackRock holding sole voting power for 20,494,650 shares and sole dispositive power for all beneficially owned shares. The disclosure emphasizes the routine nature of such institutional filings for transparency in public markets.

feed.title: BlackRock (PAYC) holds 5.76M shares, 10.6% stake reported in 13G
feed.summary: BlackRock, Inc. has filed a Schedule 13G, disclosing a beneficial ownership of 5,763,274 shares of Paycom Software, Inc. (PAYC) common stock, which represents a 10.6% stake as of March 31, 2026. The filing indicates BlackRock holds sole voting power over 5,612,689 shares and sole dispositive power over all 5,763,274 shares. The report also notes that iShares Core S&P Small-Cap ETF holds an interest exceeding five percent in Paycom common stock.

feed.title: BlackRock (NASDAQ: MTCH) reports 27.66M shares, 11.9% ownership
feed.summary: BlackRock, Inc. has filed an amendment (Schedule 13G/A) reporting its beneficial ownership in Match Group, Inc. (MTCH). The filing indicates BlackRock beneficially owns 27,660,359 shares, which represents 11.9% of Match Group's outstanding common stock. This update shows BlackRock holds significant sole voting and dispositive power over these shares, with iShares Core S&P Small-Cap ETF identified as a holder with over 5% interest.

feed.title: BlackRock (MOH) discloses 6.12M shares—11.7% stake in Molina Healthcare (MOH)
feed.summary: BlackRock, Inc. has filed an amendment to its Schedule 13G/A, disclosing a beneficial ownership of 6,116,371 shares, representing an 11.7% stake in Molina Healthcare Inc. as of March 31, 2026. The filing indicates sole voting power over 5,949,590 shares and sole dispositive power over all 6,116,371 shares, clarifying that these holdings aggregate across specific BlackRock business units. This passive investment suggests a portfolio or index-related interest rather than an activist stance.

feed.title: Coca-Cola ousts Pepsi as major hotel chain’s beverage provider
authors: Tim Darnell and Gray News staff
feed.summary: The Coca-Cola Company has secured a significant deal with Marriott International, replacing Pepsi as the hotel chain's global beverage provider. This agreement will place Coke products in Marriott's approximately 9,700 properties across 143 countries, representing a major victory in the long-standing rivalry between the two beverage giants. The deal is expected to boost Coca-Cola's core business through increased fountain pours, minibar sales, and catering volume, while also offering substantial marketing benefits.

feed.title: AIG Must Pay $110,000 to Defense Counsel, Florida Jury Finds
feed.summary: A Florida jury ordered an American International Group Inc. unit to pay $110,000 to the Lambert Law Firm PC and George Lambert. This payment is for unpaid legal bills incurred while defending a collectibles company accused of investment fraud. The jury found in favor of the law firm on a breach of implied contract claim.

feed.title: Ford Recalls 422,000 2022-2023 HD Trucks and Full-Size SUVs for Defective Windshield Wiper Arms
feed.summary: Ford Motor Company is recalling 422,613 units of its 2022-2023 Expedition SUVs, Super Duty trucks (F-250 through F-600), and Lincoln Navigator SUVs due to defective windshield wiper arm assemblies. The issue, stemming from incorrectly assembled latch retention plates, can cause wipers to malfunction, detach, or operate erratically, creating a safety hazard. While a permanent fix is still under development, Ford is instructing dealers to inspect and replace defective wiper arms, with owners expected to receive interim notices between April 13-17, 2026.

feed.title: Pebblebrook Hotel Trust (NYSE:PEB) Price Target Lowered to $9.00 at Barclays
feed.summary: Barclays has lowered its price target for Pebblebrook Hotel Trust (NYSE:PEB) from $10.00 to $9.00, maintaining an "underweight" rating and suggesting a nearly 29% downside. Despite this, the REIT recently surpassed quarterly EPS estimates and issued Q1 and FY 2026 guidance. Analyst ratings for PEB are mixed, with a consensus "Reduce" rating and an average price target of $12.33.

feed.title: JPMorgan Chase & Co. Lowers Wells Fargo & Company (NYSE:WFC) Price Target to $91.00
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. reduced its price target for Wells Fargo & Company (NYSE:WFC) from $99.50 to $91.00, maintaining a "neutral" rating. Despite this, analysts overall have a "Moderate Buy" consensus with a mean target of $97.70, though individual firm targets vary significantly. Wells Fargo shares recently traded around $81.37, while insiders have sold 115,000 shares worth approximately $10.05 million in the last 90 days.

feed.title: ONEOK (NYSE:OKE) Price Target Raised to $113.00
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley has raised its price target for ONEOK (NYSE:OKE) to $113.00 from $104.00, maintaining an "overweight" rating and suggesting a 25.13% upside. This new target is significantly higher than the MarketBeat consensus target of $89.50, which is based on a split of nine Buy and nine Hold ratings from other analysts. ONEOK recently topped Q4 EPS estimates and provided 2026 guidance, with the stock trading around $90.30.

feed.title: Pfizer’s New Phase 1 PF-07328948 Study Signals Ongoing Pipeline Investment
feed.summary: Pfizer (PFE) has initiated a new Phase 1 study for its experimental drug PF-07328948 to understand its pharmacokinetics in healthy adult men. The study, which is not yet recruiting, will evaluate oral liquid and tablet forms, including a radiolabeled version, to determine absorption, distribution, metabolism, and excretion. This early-stage research supports Pfizer's long-term pipeline development but is not expected to be a near-term catalyst for the company's stock.

feed.title: Axon Enterprise (AXON) Stock Drops 8% as Legal Risk and Analyst Cuts Pile Up
feed.summary: Axon Enterprise (AXON) stock plummeted 8.21% to a 52-week low due to mounting legal risks concerning its Scottsdale headquarters project, analyst target reductions, and a broader selloff in the SaaS sector. Despite strong Q4 bookings growth and positive fiscal 2026 revenue guidance, market sentiment has shifted, with the stock flagged as overvalued by InvestingPro. An upcoming court hearing on the headquarters lawsuits is a critical event for investors.

feed.title: Raymond James lowers MSCI stock price target to $700 on market concerns
feed.summary: Raymond James has lowered its price target for MSCI Inc. (NYSE:MSCI) to $700 from $710, while maintaining a Strong Buy rating due to anticipated headwinds from a March equity market downturn. Despite the reduced target, MSCI remains Raymond James' top pick within Information Services, citing strong sales momentum, limited AI risk, solid fundamentals with 9.75% revenue growth, and aggressive share buybacks by management. The firm also highlights MSCI's strategic acquisitions and partnerships aimed at enhancing its financial services offerings.

feed.title: State Street files 10.6% stake disclosure for News Corp (NASDAQ: NWS)
feed.summary: State Street Corporation and its affiliates, including SSGA Funds Management, Inc., have reported a beneficial ownership of 10.6% in News Corp (NASDAQ: NWS), totaling 38,828,029 shares. This disclosure was made via a Schedule 13G filing, indicating a passive investment rather than an intent to influence company control. The filing details shared voting power of 31,975,743 shares and shared dispositive power of 38,816,069 shares across various State Street entities.

feed.title: Flying Delta? Your Next Trip Just Got More Expensive
feed.summary: Delta Airlines is increasing its checked-bag fees for domestic and select short-haul international flights due to surging jet fuel prices, which have risen nearly 88 percent following the conflict in the Middle East. The first checked bag will now cost $45, and a second will be $55, though frequent flyers, premium passengers, and co-branded credit card holders may be exempt from these increases. This move reflects the airline industry's trend of passing increased operational costs to consumers.

feed.title: McDonald’s, suppliers work with NFWF on grassland conservation grants
feed.summary: The Grassland Resilience and Conservation Initiative, backed by McDonald’s and its suppliers with NFWF, has awarded $32.8 million in grants for conservation efforts. This marks the first round of a $200 million, seven-year investment aimed at supporting grasslands, cattle ranching communities, and wildlife across the Great Plains and other regions. The grants will fund improved grazing management, grassland restoration, and water conservation practices across nearly 2.5 million acres of grasslands and 4 million acres of grazing lands.

feed.title: Coca-Cola (KO) executive Sanket Ray reports shares, options and RSUs in Form 3
feed.summary: Sanket Ray, President INSWA at Coca-Cola (KO), filed an initial ownership report (Form 3) detailing his equity holdings in the company. The report shows he directly owns 72,063 shares of common stock and holds employee stock options for 39,517 shares with an exercise price of $80.455. Additionally, the filing includes restricted stock units (RSUs) vesting in 2027 and 2028, reflecting a long-term, performance-based compensation structure rather than immediate transactions.

feed.title: MGM Stock Risk/Reward Points to Upside, Says Analyst
feed.summary: Stifel analyst Steven Wieczynski reiterates a "buy" rating on MGM Resorts International (NYSE: MGM) stock, despite paring his price target to $48 from $50. He believes the stock offers a compelling risk/reward at current levels, anticipating a second-half 2026 rebound for the Las Vegas Strip and noting the strength of MGM's digital, regional casino, and Macau businesses. Wieczynski suggests that the market has overly discounted Strip leisure weakness and that forward indicators are encouraging for investors.

feed.title: Ball Corp. boosts sustainable operations for a tighter world: 84% renewable energy coverage in ’25
feed.summary: Ball Corporation’s 2025 annual and sustainability report highlights how sustainability intertwines with profitability, showing significant advancements in renewable energy coverage and emission reductions. The company's strategic operational efficiencies, supply chain tightening, and focus on regional manufacturing are designed to navigate evolving policy environments like US tariffs and European CBAM. Ball's efforts underscore a shift towards sustainability as a core resilience strategy against geopolitical and market volatilities, rather than just an expense.

feed.title: A Look At PennyMac Mortgage Investment Trust (PMT) Valuation As Shares Trade Near Recent Levels
feed.summary: PennyMac Mortgage Investment Trust (PMT) is currently trading at $11.95, which is below the average analyst price target, but its valuation appears high with a P/E of 12.1x, exceeding its industry and peer averages. The company has seen a decline in earnings and narrowing profit margins over the past five years, and a Discounted Cash Flow model suggests the stock is overvalued at $8.75 per share, indicating potential risks if mortgage credit conditions worsen. Investors should consider these mixed signals and further investigate the risks and rewards associated with PMT.

feed.title: CPI Card Group partners with Data Center Inc to expand digital wallet card access
feed.summary: CPI Card Group has announced a partnership with Data Center Inc (DCI) to allow cardholders to add their cards to digital wallets before receiving physical cards. This collaboration aims to provide earlier and more secure access to payment features, aligning with ongoing industry efforts to increase the adoption of digital and contactless payment solutions. The initiative builds on CPI Card Group's previous efforts in push provisioning and promoting metal cards for enhanced cardholder engagement.

feed.title: John Deere to pay $99 million settlement in right-to-repair lawsuit
feed.summary: John Deere has agreed to a $99 million settlement fund for farmers in a class-action lawsuit concerning repair costs. This settlement addresses "right-to-repair" issues, with Deere committing to provide repair tools and software to farmers for 10 years. The proposed settlement covers eligible farmers who paid for dealer repairs since January 2018 and is awaiting a judge's approval.

feed.title: Plus Therapeutics (PSTV) Stock: CNSide Diagnostic Secures AMA Billing Code Despite Share Decline
feed.summary: Despite a 4.80% decline in its stock price, Plus Therapeutics (PSTV) announced a significant milestone: its CNSide diagnostic system has secured a dedicated AMA billing code (0640U), effective July 1, 2026. This proprietary code will streamline reimbursement processes for the cerebrospinal fluid tumor cell diagnostic, enhancing its commercial infrastructure and market penetration in CNS oncology. The CNSide platform helps identify malignant cells in CSF, addressing a critical need in treating metastatic central nervous system malignancies.

feed.title: Oppenheimer Urges Investors To buy McDonald’s Dip As Stock Falls 10%
feed.summary: Oppenheimer has reiterated an Outperform rating and a $355 price target for McDonald's (MCD) stock, seeing a buying opportunity after a nearly 10% dip from its February high. Key catalysts include the revamped McValue platform and a new McCafe beverage lineup. The investment bank's thesis highlights underappreciated unit growth, strong international sales, and improving margins for the fast-food giant.

feed.title: Arm’s stock is falling, as Morgan Stanley throws cold water on all the Wall Street hype
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley analyst Lee Simpson has downgraded Arm Holdings (ARM) to equal weight, suggesting that further stock momentum will be challenging despite a nearly 40% rally since February. The analyst cites ongoing Qualcomm litigation and increased competition as factors that could hinder a sustained rally for Arm shares. This adjustment comes even as Arm expands into selling its own CPUs, aiming to capitalize on the CPU market.

feed.title: Deere & Co agrees to pay $99 million to settle 'right to repair' lawsuit
feed.summary: Deere & Co. has agreed to a $99 million settlement in a class-action lawsuit alleging the company monopolized repair services and withheld repair software. The lawsuit, filed in 2022, accused Deere of forcing farmers to use authorized dealers for repairs, leading to higher costs. Despite denying wrongdoing, Deere settled to resolve the issue and noted it still faces separate litigation from the Federal Trade Commission regarding similar "right to repair" claims.

feed.title: Walmart launches La Roche-Posay in stores
feed.summary: Walmart is expanding its beauty offerings by launching the skin care brand La Roche-Posay in 1,460 stores nationwide. This partnership includes training Walmart pharmacists to provide specialized skin care consultations. The move is part of Walmart's broader strategy to make advanced beauty products more accessible and strengthen its position as a leading skin care destination, competing with other major retailers and online platforms like Amazon and TikTok Shop.

feed.title: Arson suspect arrested after massive fire tears through warehouse in Ontario, California
feed.summary: An arson suspect has been detained after a large fire erupted at a Kimberly-Clark warehouse in Ontario, California. The fire started around 12:30 a.m. and prompted a major response from over 100 firefighters. Officials quickly identified the incident as suspicious, leading to an arrest, though all employees in the warehouse at the time safely evacuated.

feed.title: EQT Corp. stock: Undervalued at 62% discount with strong cash flow potential
feed.summary: EQT Corp., a leading natural gas producer, is trading at a significant discount to its intrinsic value, potentially offering a buying opportunity for investors. The company recently upsized a debt tender offer, signaling confidence in its balance sheet and proactive debt management. With strong operational efficiency, a vast inventory, and exposure to rising LNG export demand, EQT stands to benefit from global energy transitions, although commodity price volatility and regulatory shifts remain key risks.

feed.title: PSE&G Supports Continued Customer and Community Benefits in Energy Efficiency Triennium 2.5
feed.summary: PSE&G is advocating for the extension of its energy efficiency programs through June 2028, known as Triennium 2.5, to continue delivering significant benefits to customers and communities in New Jersey. These programs have already resulted in nearly $900 million in annual energy savings and avoided carbon emissions equivalent to removing over 500,000 cars, while also supporting local jobs and businesses. The company emphasizes the importance of these initiatives in managing energy costs and contributing to a stable and reliable energy system.

feed.title: New Jersey efficiency push has saved nearly $900M a year, PSE&G says
feed.summary: PSE&G is proposing to extend its New Jersey energy efficiency programs through June 2028, aiming to continue providing customer and community benefits. These programs have engaged over 480,000 customers and 20,000 businesses, resulting in nearly $900 million in collective annual energy savings and significant carbon emission reductions. The extension also seeks to maintain workforce continuity and local job creation through partnerships with trade allies and union labor.

feed.title: [POS AM] HOLOGIC INC SEC Filing
feed.summary: Hologic, Inc. (HOLX) has filed a Post-Effective Amendment to its S-3 Registration Statements, indicating the deregistration of its securities following its acquisition. On April 7, 2026, Hologic merged with Hopper Merger Sub Inc., a wholly-owned subsidiary of Hopper Parent Inc., terminating the offering and sale of Hologic's securities under the previous registration statements. The filing confirms the removal of all unsold securities from registration and the termination of the effectiveness of the registration statements.
